profile.name: Shaurya Pratap Singh
profile.bio:
Hey! I’m Shaurya Pratap Singh 👨‍💻
Currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE (AI & ML).
Exploring coding, AI/ML, and building projects while sharing my journey.

prs.title: Add Hello World in Clojure (Issue #80)
prs.body:
This PR adds a Hello World implementation in Clojure, addressing Issue #80.

The implementation includes a simple Clojure program that prints "Hello World" to the console.

prs.title: Add Hello World in Groovy
prs.body:
This PR resolves Issue #76 by adding a Hello World program in Groovy.

The program outputs "Hello, World!" to the console using Groovy's println statement.

prs.title: Malbolge hello world
prs.body:
This PR adds a Hello World program in Malbolge to address Issue #43.

Changes:
- Added `Malbolge/hello_world.mal` with a working Malbolge Hello World program
- Added `Malbolge/README.md` with:
  - Language overview and creation year
  - Complete program code
  - Instructions on how to run the program
  - Expected output
  - Fun fact about the language

Fixes #43

prs.title: Add Rust Counter Program - CLI counter with increment/decrement funct…
prs.body:
…ionality

Implements a CLI counter program in Rust with the following features:
- Increment counter
- Decrement counter
- Show current value
- Exit program

References Issue #68

prs.title: Add Hello World in C-- - Fixes #63
prs.body:
This PR adds a Hello World program in C-- (C minus minus) along with a comprehensive README.md file.

## Changes:
- Added `C--/hello_world.cmm` - Hello World program in C--
- Added `C--/README.md` - Complete documentation with:
  - Program description
  - Installation and compilation instructions
  - Fun fact about C-- and its use in GHC

Fixes #63

prs.title: Create Interactive Counter Program in JavaScript (#69)
prs.body:
This PR implements an interactive counter program in JavaScript as requested in Issue #69.

## Changes Made:
- Created `JavaScript/CounterProgram/counter.js` with a Node.js interactive counter program
- Created `JavaScript/CounterProgram/README.md` with comprehensive documentation

## Features:
- Interactive CLI menu with increase/decrease/exit options
- Real-time counter display
- Input validation
- User-friendly interface

Closes #69

prs.title: Added Nim Hello World (#60)
prs.body: Implemented standard main proc for Nim. Fixes issue #60.

prs.title: Fix footer link
prs.body:
## Summary
This PR fixes an incorrect footer link across multiple pages. The "Partner with us" link in the footer was incorrectly pointing to the Contact Us page, which has now been corrected to point to the dedicated Partner With Us page.

## Changes Made
- Updated footer link in `aboutUs.html`: Changed from `contactUs.html` to `PartnerWithUs.html`
- Updated footer link in `checkout.html`: Changed from `contactUs.html` to `PartnerWithUs.html`
- Updated footer link in `contactUs.html`: Changed from `contactUs.html` to `PartnerWithUs.html`
- Updated footer link in `menu.html`: Changed from `contactUs.html` to `PartnerWithUs.html`

## Why This Change?
The footer "Partner with us" link should direct users to the dedicated partnership page (`PartnerWithUs.html`), not the general contact page. This ensures users looking to partner with the platform are taken to the correct page with relevant information.

## Impact
- Improved user navigation and experience
- Correct routing to partnership-specific content
- Consistent footer behavior across all pages

prs.title: Add Interactive Snake and Ladder Game Component
prs.body: Added interactive React-based Snake and Ladder game (i.jsx) with board rendering, dice rolling, ladders/snakes logic, victory condition, and reset. The code is self-contained and visually enhanced for easier gameplay.

prs.title: Update contributorsList1.js
prs.body: Added Shaurya Pratap Singh to contributors list (Issue #7444)

prs.title: Fix: remove extra bottom padding from body (Issue #8028)
prs.body: This PR fixes #8028 by removing unnecessary bottom padding from the body so that the footer touches the bottom.

issues.title: Add Hello World in a New Programming Language
issues.body:
Contribute a "Hello World" implementation for a programming language that is NOT already present in the 'find here!!' directory of this repository.

## Steps:
- Identify a language missing from 'find here!!'.
- Add a new folder named with that language.
- Create the standard 'Hello World' code file for that language.
- Inside the folder, also add a README.md with a brief explanation of the language and how to run your code.

## Acceptance Criteria:
- Language must not already exist in the repo.
- Includes both source code and README.md.
- The code prints 'Hello, World!' when run.
- Follows repo guidelines for naming and format.
